messages.text: Starting the planning thread for the TechCorp Q3 QBR. Tentative date is July 15. Their main contact is James Okafor (Head of Procurement). They've been a customer for 18 months at $180K ARR — solid account but we've had three open support tickets longer than 30 days that we need to close before the call.

@Roberto Leal can you pull together TechCorp's account history — usage metrics, ticket volume, and contract details? I need it by July 8 so I have time to prep the deck. Export from Salesforce is fine.
Sure, I'll get that together. Should I include the renewal risk flag? Their contract comes up in September.
Yes, definitely include that. They're flagged as moderate churn risk because of those unresolved tickets. If we can close those before July 15 it will change the story significantly.
I can get the support tickets triaged by next week. Two of them are straightforward — just waiting on customer responses. The third is a billing dispute I need Tom Bradley to look at.
Perfect. Let's sync again on July 5 to review everything. I'll send a calendar invite.
